title: boswellia bricchettii
intro: Boswellia bricchettii, also known as Indian frankincense, is a species of tree that belongs to the Burseraceae family, native to the dry forests of India. The resin extracted from this plant is known for its anti-inflammatory and anti-oxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Boswellia bricchettii have been found to provide relief from arthritis, joint pain, and inflammatory diseases, while also showing potential in reducing stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Boswellia bricchettii include capsules, tablets, and essential oils, which can be used topically or taken orally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
